title: Background upload of files on mobile
excerpt: I am attempting to use Monday.com as a construction project management solution. We will often upload images or video from a mobile device. It can be many pictures, or large videos. When you upload an image, the mobile a…

posts.author: joshnorell (Josh Norell)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am attempting to use Monday.com as a construction project management solution. We will often upload images or video from a mobile device. It can be many pictures, or large videos. When you upload an image, the mobile app makes you completely upload the file before you can submit it and continue to use the app. This can take a VERY long time depending on the number and size of images, and the strength of your data connection.

The mobile application needs to background this upload, and permit you to continue to use the application. This delay waiting for a file to upload is simply a deal breaker for us to use monday for this application. Waiting minutes for files to upload before able to continue use is not an option.

posts.author: dbt (Doron)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have you received any feedback from Monday.com? It’s been a year now and we’re waiting for that feature as well.
If you found any other solution, that would be good to know.
Thanks.
